nasb.text: But they themselves were filled with rage, and discussed together what they might do to Jesus.

esv.text: But they were filled with fury and discussed with one another what they might do to Jesus.

cnv.text: 他們卻大怒，彼此商議怎樣對付耶穌。

ccb.text: 但法利赛人和律法教师却怒火中烧，开始商议对付耶稣的办法。

csbs.text: 他们就满腔怒火，彼此商量到底怎么对付耶稣。
